title: Write action titles for a 4-slide offering section
guidance: Reward titles that read as a connected story. Penalise labels or disconnected titles.

runner_input.instruction: Write 4 claim titles for the 4 slide bodies below.
runner_input.constraints: 4 titles. Each max 14 words. Read together, they should tell the pitch.

items: Slide 1 body: AI is reshaping claims handling; rivals quote 3-day cycles
Slide 2 body: three use cases — triage, fraud flagging, customer comms
Slide 3 body: our offering — an auditable agent, live in 8 weeks
Slide 4 body: roadmap — pilot in 8 weeks, scale to all lines in 6 months

rubric_notes: Reading the 4 titles alone should deliver the pitch: AI is taking the market -> here are the three highest-value uses -> our agent is auditable and fast -> here's the path to scale.
